name: codex-flows-local-workspace
description: Local Codex workspace agent operation and plugin-bundled hooks.

interface.shortDescription: Operate a local workspace agent with plugin-bundled hooks.
interface.longDescription: codex-flows local workspace installs skills for local agent operation and passive Codex lifecycle hooks that write workspace hook-spool events. It does not automatically start or install a persistent service.
defaultPrompt: Check the local Codex workspace agent.
Check workspace agent and hook status.
